summary: CoverPreviewWidget designed for all 4 ResultState branches (idle, loading/generating, data/preview, error). 4 HTML mockups created in docs/design/html-mockups/iter-4/. styles.css extended with cover-preview, spinner, overlay, and snackbar classes. No new screens or routes — all UI changes are within the existing EventFormPage/EventFormContent. design.md updated with component hierarchy, interaction flows, and locked decisions.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All 4 HTML mockups present in iter-4/; styles.css present in iter-4/shared/; design.md updated; contract written

qualityGates.name: design_coverage_complete
qualityGates.notes: All 4 coverGenerationResult states covered: initial() → event-form-idle.html; loading() → event-form-generating.html (with regeneration variant); data(url) → event-form-preview.html; error(e) → event-form-error.html. All US-4-1 ACs (1-9) and US-4-2 ACs (1-7) addressed in mockups or annotations.

qualityGates.name: no_new_screens_or_routes
qualityGates.notes: All 4 states are sub-states of the existing EventFormPage. CoverPreviewWidget is a new widget within the form, not a new page.

qualityGates.name: spanish_copy_complete
qualityGates.notes: 5 l10n keys defined: event_coverGenerating, event_coverGenerated, event_coverGenerateError, event_coverRegenerate, event_coverGeneratingOverlay — matches architect handoff ARB table exactly

qualityGates.name: continuation_rule_followed
qualityGates.notes: No redesign of existing screens. Iteration 3 design decisions preserved. styles.css copied forward from iter-1, extended with iter-4 classes only.

qualityGates.name: 16_9_aspect_ratio_enforced
qualityGates.notes: All mockups use 16:9 aspect-ratio cover container. Consistent with event list card ratio per US-4-1 AC-8.

qualityGates.name: publish_button_enabled_during_generation
qualityGates.notes: event-form-generating.html explicitly shows 'Publicar evento' button enabled. Annotated as AC-4 of US-4-1.

qualityGates.name: overlay_not_blank_on_regeneration
qualityGates.notes: event-form-generating.html includes second variant showing overlay over existing image (not blank). Annotated as AC-3 of US-4-2.
